articles.title: BitMEX Co-Founder Arthur Hayes Predicts Little-Known Altcoin Will Overtake Solana ($SOL)
articles.description: The co-founder of popular cryptocurrency derivatives trading platform BitMEX, Arthur Hayes, has set the cryptocurrency community abuzz with his prediction that Aptos ($APT) will overtake Solana ($SOL) as the second-most prominent Layer 1 (L1) blockchain, behind only Ethereum, within the next two to three years. Hayes, known for his sharp market insights, offered this glimpse […]

articles.title: Is It Possible For ADA To Flip Bitcoin? Cardano Founder Gives Reason Why
articles.description: Cardano founder, Charles Hoskinson, boldly predicted at the 2023 Rare Evo conference that ADA would become the largest cryptocurrency in the world. In a recent interview, he provided insights into why he believes that will happen, with Cardano flipping Bitcoin on its way to achieving such status. articles.title: VeChain’s VeBetterDAO: The Web3 Sustainability Project You Need to Know About
articles.description: Blockchain researcher Collin Brown heralds a new era for sustainability with the launch of VeBetterDAO on VeChain’s testnet, emphasizing the role of Web3 technology in driving a greener future. VeChain has confirmed the anticipated launch of VeBetterDAO’s mainnet, scheduled for June 28, 2024. This launch represents a notable milestone in technological advancement, driving global sustainability...
